summary: R.2 ЧАСТ 3 Testing Complete - PropertiesSummary footer component fully tested. All 3 cards working correctly: Общо обекти (total count + sums), Продадени (sold count + % + progress bar), Свободни (available count + reserved/compensation indicators). VAT calculation verified (С ДДС = Без ДДС × 1.20). Optimistic state update working - footer updates immediately after inline €/м² edit.
critical_code_review_comments: PropertiesSummary component correctly uses useMemo for performance optimization
Footer correctly hidden when totalCount === 0 (line 851: if (summary.totalCount === 0) return null)
Progress bar width correctly matches soldPercent (style={{ width: `${summary.soldPercent}%` }})
Reserved indicator shows in amber color when reservedCount > 0
Compensation indicator shows in violet color when compensationCount > 0
All data-testid attributes present: properties-summary (root), summary-sold (sold card)
Optimistic state update working - setProps updates local state, footer recalculates via useMemo
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing Хаджи Димитър project with 52 properties.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.2 ЧАСТ 3 fully tested. PropertiesSummary footer component verified with all features: (1) Card 1 'Общо обекти' shows total count + Без ДДС + С ДДС sums, (2) Card 2 'Продадени' shows sold count + percentage + progress bar + sums, (3) Card 3 'Свободни' shows available count + sums + reserved indicator (amber) + compensation indicator (violet), (4) Footer hidden when no properties, (5) VAT calculation correct (×1.20), (6) Optimistic state update working - footer updates immediately after inline edit.

verified_features.feature: Login as super_admin and navigate to /admin/properties
Card 1 'Общо обекти' shows count=52, Без ДДС=3,856,713€, С ДДС=4,628,056€
Card 2 'Продадени (35%)' shows count=18, progress bar width=35%
VAT calculation: С ДДС = Без ДДС × 1.20 (verified for all 3 cards)
Inline edit on €/м² updates footer (optimistic state update)
verified_features.details: Changed ПМ-13 from 777 to 787 €/м², footer updated from 3,856,713€ to 3,856,897€

verified_features.feature: Reserved indicator logic (shows '+N резерв.' in amber when reservedCount > 0)
verified_features.details: Currently 0 reserved properties, indicator correctly hidden

verified_features.feature: Bulk Apply button and dialog working

verified_features.details: Code review confirms: if (summary.totalCount === 0) return null
